adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `DotNetToolPackage` DSC Resource allows you to install, update, and uninstall .NET tool packages using the dotnet CLI.

PackageId.title: PackageId
PackageId.description:
The ID of the .NET tool package to manage. This is a required parameter.

    For a list of available .NET tool packages, see the following link: https://www.nuget.org/packages?q=&includeComputedFrameworks=true&packagetype=dotnettool&prerel=true&sortby=relevance

Version.title: Version
Version.description: The version of the .NET tool package to install. If not specified, the latest version will be installed.

Commands.title: Commands
Commands.description: An array of commands provided by the .NET tool package. This parameter is optional.

Prerelease.title: Prerelease
Prerelease.description: Indicates whether to include prerelease versions of the .NET tool package. The default value is $false.

ToolPathDirectory.title: ToolPathDirectory
ToolPathDirectory.description: The directory where the .NET tool package will be installed. If not specified, the package will be installed globally.

Exist.title: Exist
Exist.description: Indicates whether the package should exist. Defaults to $true.

embedded.description: The `DotNetToolPackage` DSC Resource allows you to install, update, and uninstall .NET tool packages using the dotnet CLI.
embedded.title: Microsoft.DotNet.Dsc/DotNetToolPackage
